description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux Builds that runs on every push to master and github_actions branches and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix of ubuntu-20.04 jobs with various configurations to build Godot engine with different settings, such as target, precision, and warnings. For each job, clone the Godot repository and a custom module, set up a custom buildroot, load and upload a .scons_cache directory, and compile the engine with scons using specific flags.
